name: modern-seo
description: Primary-source SEO and agentic-web guidance grounded in Google's AI optimization guide and Chrome's agentic-browsing docs. Covers the two-surface model: ranking in Google Search/AI features (plus non-Google engines like ChatGPT and Perplexity), and being usable by AI agents (WebMCP, Lighthouse agentic-browsing, UCP/ACP).
